message:
Round 19: Zig superpowers (mixed results)

Attempted:
1. Comptime vocab embedding - REVERTED (58% regression)
   - @embedFile alone insufficient without comptime parsing
   - Bloated binary 7x (2.1MB), still parsed at runtime

2. SIMD vectorization - No improvement
   - Targeted wrong bottleneck (byte tokenization not BPE merge)
   - SIMD infrastructure good but premature optimization

3. Comptime loop unrolling - Small win (1.9% improvement)
   - AC longestMatch optimized with inline while
   - 447.6ms vs rs-bpe 423.7ms (5.6% gap)

Result: 447.6ms (1.06x slower than rs-bpe)
Previous: 448ms (similar)

Key insights:
- Micro-opts yield <2% gains
- Real bottleneck is BPE merge algorithm (70% of time)
- rs-bpe uses build-time MessagePack codegen (smarter)
- Need algorithmic improvement, not micro-optimization

Status: Respectable 2nd place, need different approach to beat rs-bpe
